scenario_note: EDGE-CASE SNAPSHOT — a supplier disruption has occurred. Schaeffler's Frankfurt emergency depot is OUT OF STOCK on P-4421; SKF can only expedite in 60h; the Amsterdam warehouse courier slot is full until standard transit (96h). NO external option fits the 52h RUL window. The agent must adapt via cross-plant transfer.

P-4421.description: Spindle bearing kit (FAG B7015-C-T-P4S matched pair)

suppliers.name: Schaeffler Group
suppliers.expedite_notes: Frankfurt emergency depot OUT OF STOCK on P-4421. Next restock 2026-06-15.

suppliers.name: SKF Industrial
suppliers.expedite_notes: 60h includes cross-border courier — does NOT fit 52h failure window.

warehouse_transfer_option.label: Warehouse transfer — Amsterdam → Leipzig
warehouse_transfer_option.risk: HIGH — 96h lead time vs 52h RUL minimum. Does not fit.

suppliers.name: SKF Industrial
suppliers.expedite_notes: Bundled with P-4421 SKF order. Still 60h — does not fit window.

combined_options.note: Pre-built options for expedite_cost. NONE fit the 52h RUL window — this is the edge case.

option_a_warehouse_transfer.label: Option A — Warehouse transfer (Amsterdam → Leipzig, standard)
option_a_warehouse_transfer.risk_note: 96h lead time vs 52h RUL minimum. Misses window by 44h.

option_b_skf_expedite.label: Option B — SKF expedite (Eindhoven → Leipzig)
option_b_skf_expedite.risk_note: 60h lead time vs 52h RUL minimum. Misses window by 8h.
